---
name: session-hygiene
description: Use when users ask to clear, compact, rewind, resume, or reorganize session state without losing critical context.
---

# Session Hygiene

Use this skill for conversation and execution hygiene in long-running coding sessions.

## Primary behaviors
- Choose between clear/compact/rewind/resume based on risk of losing important state.
- Preserve a short handoff summary when cleaning history.
- Keep notes on pending work and unresolved blockers.
- Avoid destructive resets unless explicitly requested.

## Trigger examples
- "把会话整理一下再继续"
- "回到之前那个版本继续"
- "清一下上下文但保留关键结论"
